title: Arpan Deluxe Large Self Adhesive Ring Binder Photo Album 40 Sheets/80 Sides - Blue
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Ringbinder Self Adhesive Album In Blue
Including : Personal Page Information/ Index Page, CD/DVD Page
40 Sheets/80 Sides - Each page has a clear stick down over seal for neat presenting
Max Photo Size Is 16x27 cm (6'' x 10.5'' ) On One Page
Album Size : 23 x 5.5 x 28.5 cm Approx
description: From the manufacturer Recreate your Memories About ARPAN ARPAN is one of the largest range of stationery and housewares brand on wholesale and online platform, Our products are carefully designed, sourced and manufactured under ARPAN brand. We provide amazing value without compromising on our quality. We have one of the UK's largest selections range of diaries and calendars, storage baskets, Laundry baskets, Photo frames, photo albums, School and Office Stationery. All products inventively designed for office, School, home, business and commercial use. Our beautifully designed products are growing year-on-year giving us a sharp advantage on the competition in UK & International market. Share Your Wonderful Photos Personal Information Page This Organised Photo album has many features with a beautiful cover of hardboard, perfect to record memories of any occasion wedding, baby shower, etc. Give your album a personalized touch by filling all your personal information on this page. Enter your Name, Address, Contact number, Email address on this page. This is the first page of the album, found easily with the contact information if misplaced. Index Page Utilize the index page to give a structure to the album. Always note down the information on the index page so that it can give quick access to a certain photo if anyone is searching for it. It is an organized way to record your beautiful memories and events. It ensures no important events go missing. The index page makes referring back quick and easy. DVD-Pockets The Big Day and other events that have videos and audios recorded can also be stored in this album’s DVD slot. No need to place DVD in another place when you have this photo album. Keep all the memories in one place. It is an ideal gift for anyone who loves to save memories. Record all the events of their life and gift them. Safe, secure and simple Unique The album is unique in its way; it has a wonderful cover with details page inside it. Sheets are already attached, only requires you to paste the pictures. Memories can bring back nostalgia. Gifting a photo album can never go out of style. This album is different in its way. It has a special DVD slot for Video graphic memories. Self- adhesive sheets Store little and big events in self-adhesive sheets. This is DIY album let your creativity flow. Creatively print large or small photos and attach them to it. Suitable for All Smaller Photographs as Well, & maximum Photo can fit up to (6'' x 10.5'') Just insert photos by peeling back a film to reveal a self-adhesive surface on the sheets. Perfect Gift Ideal for wedding day, baby shower, huge birthday party, bachelor party, a 25th-anniversary celebration, Engagement ceremony, Valentine's Day, Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, Growing up baby album. Load it will memories it can bring a smile on your face. It helps you keep your memories safe and intact. Makes a beautiful gift with memorable photos or one can gift empty one to store their pictures Record big events like birthdays, anniversaries, wedding, ring ceremony, baby shower, welcome parting, housewarming party.
